title: Barnabas #0921
definition:
Barnabas = "son of rest (or Nabas = prophecy)"

 1) the surname of Joses or Joseph, a Levite, a native of Cyprus
    He was a distinguished Christian teacher and companion and
    colleague of Paul.
nasbUsage:
Definition: Barnabas = "son of rest (or Nabas = prophecy)"

 1) the surname of Joses or Joseph, a Levite, a native of Cyprus
    He was a distinguished Christian teacher and companion and
    colleague of Paul.

    NASB:  Barnabas, an Isr. companion of Paul:
